issue.title: Align README with WordPressHx Port identity

command: align the public README with the WordPressHx Port identity and the separate wordpress-hx-sdk product boundary

artifacts.role: canonical public project identity, scope, and SDK boundary
accepted authority for the repository rename and product separation

verification_commands: if rg -n "WordPressHX" README.md; then exit 1; fi
non_claims: This documentation change does not create or implement wordpress-hx-sdk.
This documentation change does not add WordPress or Gutenberg Haxe ownership.
SDK evidence remains separate from full-port ownership and compatibility evidence.
